events_scope_shape_check.name: events_scope_shape_check
events_scope_shape_check.value:
(
        ("events"."scope_kind" = 'turn' AND "events"."turn_id" IS NOT NULL)
        OR
        ("events"."scope_kind" = 'thread' AND "events"."turn_id" IS NULL)
      )

host_daemon_commands_payload_prune_idx.name: host_daemon_commands_payload_prune_idx
host_daemon_commands_payload_prune_idx.where:
"host_daemon_commands"."completed_at" IS NOT NULL
          AND ("host_daemon_commands"."payload" <> '{}' OR "host_daemon_commands"."result_payload" IS NOT NULL)

project_sources_shape_check.name: project_sources_shape_check
